title: Karnataka HC stays intimidation case filed against Slice Bank MD, HR head on ex-legal officer’s complaint
description: The Karnataka High Court on Tuesday stayed criminal proceedings against the Managing Director (MD) and Human Resources Head at Slice Small Finance Bank, which were initiated on a complaint filed by the organisation's former Chief Legal and Strategy Officer [Yudan Wang & other Vs State of Karnataka & Ors].A vacation Bench of Justice R Nataraj granted the interim relief on petitions filed by Slice's MD Rajan Bajaj and its HR head, Yudan Wang to quash the criminal case against them.
